Robert Welles
(6 November 1540 – 24 September 1617)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Welles and Alice Hunt were married about 1568 in Stouron, Warwickshre.

Their children born/baptized in Stourton, Warwickshire.

Jane Welles baptized April 24, 1569.

Alice Welles born about 15 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Welles於1540年11月6日出生在英國瓦維其可爾其福德時，他的父親Thomas Welles28歲，母親Elizabeth Bryan24歲。他於1565年與Alice Hunt在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年9月24日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾傑林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Welles于1540年11月6日出生在英国瓦維其可爾其福德时，他的父亲Thomas Welles28岁，母亲Elizabeth Bryan24岁。他于1565年与Alice Hunt在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾阿斯頓 克林頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年9月24日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾傑林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Welles was born on 6 November 1540, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Welles, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Bryan, was 24. He married Alice Hunt in 1565, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 24 September 1617, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Cherington, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alice Hunt en 1565, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1617, à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Cherington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wellesが1540年11月6日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードで生まれた時，父Thomas Wellesは28歳，母Elizabeth Bryanは24歳であった。1565年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンでAlice Huntと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年9月24日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチェリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Welles(이)가 1540년 11월 6일 영국 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Welles(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Bryan(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 Alice Hunt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 9월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 처링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.Aston Clinton, Vale of Aylesbury, Buckin: Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Welles nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1540, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Welles, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bryan, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Hunt em 1565, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de setembro de 1617, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Cherington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Aston Clinton, Vale of Aylesbury, Buckin: Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Welles родился 6 ноября 1540 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Welles было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bryan, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hunt в 1565 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 24 сентября 1617 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности чирингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.6 November 1540–24 September 1617: 6 de noviembre de 1540–24 de septiembre de 1617
es.Aston Clinton, Vale of Aylesbury, Buckin: Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Welles nació el 6 de noviembre de 1540, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Welles, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bryan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Alice Hunt en 1565, en Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1617, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Cherington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
